TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT IAN GAFFNEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, NOTICE WAS DEFECTIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH, CSR# 1193

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT DEMURRING PARTY WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
